arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EBS volume.

availability_zone.description: The availability zone where the EBS volume is located.

encrypted.description: Indicates whether the EBS volume is encrypted.

id.description: The unique identifier of the EBS volume.

iops.description: The input/output operations per second (IOPS) of the EBS volume.

kms_key_id.description: The identifier of the AWS KMS key used to encrypt the volume.

multi_attach_enabled.description: Indicates if the volume can be attached to multiple instances.

outpost_arn.description: The ARN of the Outpost where the EBS volume is located, if applicable.

size.description: The size of the EBS volume in GiBs.

snapshot_id.description: The snapshot from which the EBS volume was created, if applicable.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the EBS volume.

throughput.description: The throughput of the EBS volume in MiB/s, relevant for certain volume types.

volume_id.description: The ID of the EBS volume.

volume_type.description: The type of the EBS volume (e.g., gp2, io1).
